positive: A kawaii-style illustration of a picnic basket filled with anthropomorphic woodland creatures (bunnies, hedgehogs) sharing berries and scones. The style should be vibrant, cheerful, and highly adorable, resembling modern children's book illustration, soft pastel colors, whimsical, perfect for sticker design.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
